---
title: "W1 - Tidyverse Basics"
author: "Louis Chou"
date: "2026-06-03"
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

## Dataset Overview

```{r}
# Preview the built-in mtcars dataset
head(mtcars)
```

## Exercise 1: Filter + Sort

```{r}
# Select 8-cylinder cars, sort by mpg descending,
# keep only mpg, hp, wt
result1 <- mtcars %>%
  filter(cyl == 8) %>%
  arrange(desc(mpg)) %>%
  select(mpg, hp, wt)

result1
```

## Exercise 2: Create New Variable

```{r}
# Create hp_per_cyl = hp / cyl
# Show only hp, cyl, hp_per_cyl
result2 <- mtcars %>%
  mutate(hp_per_cyl = hp / cyl) %>%
  select(hp, cyl, hp_per_cyl)

result2
```

## Exercise 3: Group Summary

```{r}
# Group by cyl, calculate mean mpg, max hp, count of cars
result3 <- mtcars %>%
  group_by(cyl) %>%
  summarise(
    mpg_mean = mean(mpg),
    max_hp   = max(hp),
    n        = n()
  )

result3
```

## Exercise 4: Combined Operations

```{r}
# Filter manual transmission (am == 1)
# Add wt_kg = wt * 453.6
# Sort by wt_kg ascending
result4 <- mtcars %>%
  filter(am == 1) %>%
  mutate(wt_kg = wt * 453.6) %>%
  arrange(wt_kg)

result4
```
